policy: Every advisory allowlist entry must name the vulnerability ID, exact package, exact version, ecosystem, human review reason, and future expiresOn date. Expired, malformed, broad, package-less, or version-less entries fail before the scanner runs.

allowedVulnerabilities.reason: Initial W16 OSV baseline from v2.3.8 real pnpm-lock scan; dependency owner must remediate or renew with fresh review before expiry.
